description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Static analysis that runs on every push and pull request. Use two ubuntu-latest jobs, StyleAndFormatting and Clang-Tidy, to perform static code analysis. In StyleAndFormatting, check out the repository, update submodules, run static validation, lint C++ code with clang-format, and lint markdown files. In Clang-Tidy, check out the repository, update submodules, install dependencies, and run clang-tidy on main and external code.
